name: Sentry Project Issues
description: Fetches issues from a Sentry project and returns them as a table.

input_schema.name: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
input_schema.label: Auth Token env var name
input_schema.description: Name of the environment variable holding your Sentry Auth Token.

input_schema.name: organization-slug
input_schema.label: Organization Slug
input_schema.description: Your Sentry organization slug (found in the Sentry URL).

input_schema.name: project-slug
input_schema.label: Project Slug
input_schema.description: Your Sentry project slug (found in the Sentry URL).

input_schema.name: query
input_schema.label: Issue Query
input_schema.description: Sentry search query to filter issues (e.g. is:unresolved).

input_schema.name: limit
input_schema.label: Max Issues
input_schema.description: Maximum number of issues to fetch (up to 500).
